content.en:
"The Realm of the Realm, are you sure?"

Ye Tian was also extremely shocked.

The realm of the origin is not an ordinary place, even in the entire chaos, it is also an incomparably rare treasure land, and it will only be born once in countless years, and every time it is born, it is accompanied by the fall and death of many true ancestors.

The Realm of Origin was basically born in the Chaos Continent, and was never born in the Universe or Dao Realm, but I didn't expect that the Realm of Origin was born in the Quasi-Dao Realm.

The realm of the Realm Source is also a kind of world, but it is not an ordinary world, and it is a treasure land that specializes in the birth of cultivation-type innate origin things.

In the realm of the source of the realm, any plant is an innate origin thing, and it can basically be used for cultivation, these innate origin things can be used to improve cultivation, can be used to refine the physical body, can be used to improve the divine soul, and is almost an all-powerful innate origin thing.

The only thing that they can't do is that they can't assist in cultivating Chaos Divine Powers, which is also a flaw in the cultivation class of innate origin things.

Strictly speaking, these innate origin things can be called top-level cultivation resources.

Once you enter the realm of the source of the realm, you can harvest a little bit casually, and it will be a real big harvest!

"In which true country was the Realm of Origin born?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Flower God True Country!"

Yanglong Zhenjun said truthfully.

"It turned out to be the flower god real country!"

Ye Tian knew a little about the Flower God Valley behind this true country, this was a big force with only one Dao Ancestor, and this Dao Ancestor's strength was not very strong, and the time to become a Dao Ancestor was not very long, and he belonged to the new Dao Ancestor.

Huashen Valley can also be said to be a new big force, far less than the old top big power.

In addition, all of them are female disciples, which is also a consistent tradition of the Valley of Flowers.

"If the Realm of Origin is born in the top powers such as the God of War Tower, the Immortal Gate, the Chaos Trading House, and the Giant Axe City, even if it can't completely occupy the Realm of Origin Realm, it will be enough to protect most of the benefits. But the Flower God True Kingdom is too weak, I'm afraid it won't be able to keep any interests at all!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Weakness is like this, even if there is an amazing opportunity born in the real country, there is no way to keep it, how sad.

And the area of the Flower God True Kingdom is too large and there are many people, and it is impossible to completely conceal the news, so the news leaked, resulting in countless True Monarchs pouring into the Flower God True Kingdom.

Although the Valley of the Gods of Flowers can mobilize the power of the True Kingdom of the Gods of Flowers to suppress the other True Monarchs, the Valley of the Gods of Flowers does not dare to do so, otherwise the top forces will invade the True Kingdom of the Gods of Flowers, even if the Valley of the Gods of Flowers can mobilize the power of the True Kingdom of the Gods, it will inevitably be defeated!

From the mouth of the Yang Dragon True Monarch, Ye Tian learned that the Boundary Source Realm was still in gestation, and it had not been completely conceived, and it would take some time, otherwise, countless True Monarchs would inevitably all pour into the Boundary Source Realm.

"Yang Long, are you going to the realm of the source of the realm?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Master, my subordinates won't go!" Yang Long Zhenjun struggled for a moment, but then shook his head and gave up his plan to enter the realm of the source of the realm.

He knew his strength very well, although he was very strong compared to ordinary True Monarchs, he was too weak compared to those top True Monarchs.

Those most terrifying top-notch true monarchs could crush him countless times with a single finger.

If he goes to the Realm of Origin, I'm afraid the probability of falling will reach 99%!

Although there are many innate origin things in the realm of the Realm Source Realm, they are of great value, and you can have a big harvest by going to it casually, but if you can't survive, no matter how much you gain, it will be in vain.

Therefore, he chose not to go to the realm of the source.

"That's fine, when the realm of the origin is born, after the other true monarchs are finished snatching, you choose to enter it, there may not be many innate origin things at that time, but it is better to be safer, there will not be many fights!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Yes, master!" Yang Long Zhenjun nodded, and then asked, "Master, are you going to the realm of the Boundary Source?"

"Go!" Ye Tiandao: "I need a lot of resources at the moment, and the Realm of Origin can allow me to have a lot of gains, so I naturally want to go." However, you don't have to worry about my safety, my strength may not be as good as those top true monarchs, but my life-saving ability is not bad!"

Yanglong Zhenjun also nodded, he knew how terrifying his master's life-saving ability was, it could be called a real rebellion.

"Yanglong Zhenjun, you go and find out how long it will take for the Realm Source Realm to be truly conceived, I need to retreat for a while. Ye Tiandao.

"My subordinates will do it!"

Yanglong Zhenjun left.

After Yanglong Zhenjun left, Ye Tian returned to his territory and took out those high-level resources to start retreating and cultivating.

After cultivating with high-level resources, Ye Tian's cultivation speed was much faster.

Originally, if he used ordinary resources to cultivate the second layer of the Xuanxu Jue True Spirit Chapter, it would probably take hundreds of millions of years to cultivate to the second layer, but if he used high-level resources to cultivate, it would only take millions of years at most.

And just like that, year after year passed.

Not long after, Yang Long Zhenjun also came with a message, informing Ye Tian about the specific time when the Boundary Source Realm was conceived.

"6 million years from now!"

This is the approximate time, the approximate time that many True Monarchs have calculated.

For Zhenjun, 6 million years is nothing.

As a result, in the Flower God True Realm, huge cities were established, and those True Monarchs were in retreat and cultivation here, waiting for the complete birth of the Realm of Origin Realm.

In this regard, the Valley of the Flower God had no choice but to let these true monarchs do so.

In the blink of an eye, 5 million years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had completely cultivated to the second layer of the Xuanxu Jue True Spirit Chapter, his physical body had doubled again, and his strength had skyrocketed again.

"There are still 1 million years to go, no matter how much you cultivate the Xuanxu Jue, you can't cultivate the third layer of the Xuanxu Jue True Spirit Chapter, so let's cultivate other things!"

Ye Tian thought about it, and finally decided to upgrade the prototype of the Great Dao first.

After all, the increase of the Great Dao Prototype in battle is also very important, and this is also the fastest way to improve.

In this way, under Ye Tian's full cultivation and promotion, the prototype of Ye Tian's Great Dao spanned to 90,000 meters long and 30,000 meters wide.

Such a powerful prototype of the Great Dao was of great help to Ye Tian's strength increase.

this day.

The realm of the origin of the realm is about to be born, and a true monarch has once again poured into the true kingdom of the flower god.

Ye Tian also entered the Flower God True Kingdom, but it was with the True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Palace.

"Little junior brother, not long after you entered the True Monarch, I am afraid that it will be dangerous to enter the realm of the Realm of Origin!"

Long Hai Zhenjun reminded him.

"Senior Brother Long Hai, Senior Brother, my strength may not be enough, but my ability to save my life is very strong!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Seeing this, Long Hai Zhenjun didn't say anything anymore, but as soon as he thought of his master's advice, he said: "This is a special transmission note, which can be located, and can be used even in the realm of the source of the realm, if you really encounter danger, send a message to me, I will go to rescue you as soon as possible!"

"Thank you, Senior Brother Longhai!"

Ye Tian accepted it.

Under normal circumstances, this transmission note is useless, but in case it really comes to a point where you can't compete with it, then this transmission note is the last hope.
